name: Partisant
ability: You start knowing 1 in-play Townsfolk. If they die at night, an evil player dies. The Demon knows a Partisant is in play.
flavor: You can kill the revolutionary, but never the revolution!
firstNightReminder:
Show the Townsfolk character token marked *KNOWN*.
Wake the Demon. Show the Partisant token.
otherNightReminder: If the *KNOWN* player died tonight, an evil player dies. :reminder: :reminder:
